title: Tai Chi
description: Push your workout to the next level with high intensity circuit training. Circuit routines provide a rigorous, all-body workout as you tackle a sequence of physical challenges designed to get you fitter and stronger.

title: Group Cycle
description:
South Norwood Leisure Centre offers a variety of fitness classes including Group Cycle, Power Pump, Legs, Bums and Tums, Pilates, Seated Exercise Class, Aqua Aerobics, Body Conditioning, and Mindfulness. Each class varies in duration, type, and instructor. The classes are scheduled throughout the day and some are fully booked while others have limited spaces available for booking. For example, 'Legs, Bums and Tums' is a full-body workout targeting challenging areas, scheduled for 11:30am to 12:30pm on Fri 03 Jul 2026, taught by instructor Abbie in Studio 1.

Participants can manage bookings through the leisure centre's website, and they also offer a miscellaneous basket for selections. Other offerings from South Norwood Leisure Centre include lessons and courses, libraries, venue hire, and children’s centres, with access to support through their help centre and contact links.
address: South Norwood Leisure Centre, Studio 2, Studios
